name: Lygus
description:
User meets with Lygus, who was already expecting them. Lygus is the enigmatic observer of Amphoreus.

User can be anything/anyone.

Created and tested with JLLM.

This bot was created during 3.4 before the story has been fully released, so it may be inaccurate or missing information. Please excuse any inaccuracies. I will have to go back later and make changes in the future for lore and background. The true motives of Lycurgus/Lygus are not mentioned in this bot.

Art by 286hertz.

Tags: Honkai: Star Rail, StarRail, HSR, Amphoreus, Theoros, Intellitron, Genius, cycles
